info.name: Medical AI Multi-Agent API

request.description: Check if the API is running and healthy
Upload a medical report PDF for analysis

request.description: Analyze medical report text directly (without PDF upload)

urlencoded.value:
LABORATORY REPORT
Patient: Jane Smith
Date: 2024-01-20

HEMATOLOGY:
Hemoglobin: 14.2 g/dL (Normal: 12.0-16.0)
WBC: 6.5 x10^3/μL (Normal: 4.0-11.0)
RBC: 4.5 x10^6/μL (Normal: 4.0-5.5)
Platelets: 220 x10^3/μL (Normal: 150-400)

CHEMISTRY:
Glucose (Fasting): 88 mg/dL (Normal: 70-100)
Cholesterol: 175 mg/dL (Desirable: <200)
Creatinine: 0.9 mg/dL (Normal: 0.6-1.2)

THYROID:
TSH: 2.1 mIU/L (Normal: 0.4-4.0)

LIVER FUNCTION:
ALT: 28 U/L (Normal: 7-56)
AST: 25 U/L (Normal: 10-40)
urlencoded.description: Medical report with all normal values

request.description: Test with a report that has all normal values

urlencoded.value:

WBC: 18.5 x10^3/μL (Normal: 4.0-11.0) - HIGH
Platelets: 85 x10^3/μL (Normal: 150-400) - LOW

CHEMISTRY:
Glucose: 450 mg/dL (Normal: 70-100) - CRITICAL HIGH
Creatinine: 3.5 mg/dL (Normal: 0.6-1.2) - CRITICAL HIGH

LIVER FUNCTION:
ALT: 185 U/L (Normal: 7-56) - HIGH
AST: 220 U/L (Normal: 10-40) - HIGH
